# Minimal Maintainable Code

> A lightweight Agent Skill for AI coding agents that reduces unnecessary code, abstractions, dependencies, configuration, and unrelated refactoring without sacrificing correctness, readability, security, accessibility, validation, tests, or output quality.

Canonical repository: https://github.com/sharpscroll/minimal-maintainable-code
License: MIT
Current version: 1.0.0
Format: Agent Skills / SKILL.md

## Primary purpose

Use Minimal Maintainable Code when an AI coding agent is building, modifying, reviewing, debugging, or refactoring software and should make the smallest clear, complete, maintainable change that satisfies the request.

## Governing principle

Solve the real problem with the fewest necessary concepts, not the fewest possible lines.

## Key behaviours

- Inspect relevant existing code, tests, configuration, and conventions before changing anything.
- Reuse existing project code and platform capabilities before adding new abstractions or dependencies.
- Avoid speculative future-proofing, unnecessary configuration, and unrelated refactoring.
- Preserve correctness, readability, security, privacy, accessibility, validation, useful error handling, and output quality.
- Run proportionate tests and available lint, type-check, and build commands.
- Simplify only the changed area after the implementation works.
- State checks actually run and any remaining risks or assumptions.

## Important limitations

- This skill does not guarantee bug-free code.
- It does not replace repository-specific architecture, security, or coding instructions.
- It is not a code-golfing prompt and does not optimize blindly for fewer lines.
- Human review and project-specific verification remain important.

## Files

- README: https://github.com/sharpscroll/minimal-maintainable-code/blob/main/README.md
- Skill: https://github.com/sharpscroll/minimal-maintainable-code/blob/main/SKILL.md
- Installation: https://github.com/sharpscroll/minimal-maintainable-code/blob/main/INSTALL.md
- License: https://github.com/sharpscroll/minimal-maintainable-code/blob/main/LICENSE
